name: law firms processing 5–15 cases/month tool
description: For law firms processing 5–15 cases/month, outdated compliance knowledge causes legal penalties. We provide automated regulatory tracking instead of manual tracking of regulatory changes.
problem_solved: Staying compliant with constantly changing regulations
